headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: A fair, source‑backed comparison of Super and Apple’s new Siri AI. Siri is becoming a much more capable, privacy‑centric, voice‑first assistant deeply integrated into Apple devices. Super is built for a different job: durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer‑use cache, making repeated workflows faster and cheaper over time. This page explains where each shines, where they differ, and which fits repeated computer work.
